common.fullDetailsPage: Full details, context, and updates on the dedicated page.
common.haveProblemSub: Whether it's technical, strategic, or social — if the problem is real, I want to hear about it.

home.bio1: Cancer has been part of my family for as long as I can remember — uncles, aunts, cousins, all fighting it at different points. At 16, my father was diagnosed with skin cancer. I didn't know then that survival depended so heavily on the type. To me, cancer meant one thing. That misunderstanding hit like a reset: a sudden urgency to live fully, to act, and to dedicate myself to problems that actually matter.
home.bio2: That urgency pushed me across fields — public policy, software engineering, data systems, cybersecurity, AI/ML. Not because I was chasing credentials, but because the hardest problems don't fit inside one discipline.
home.bio3: It also led me to build the <psf>Problem Solver Foundation</psf> — a community that connects people across borders to solve real-world problems using technology and science. My mission: <mission>impact one billion lives by 2035</mission>.
home.newsletterSubtitle: Occasional notes on cybersecurity, deep work, and what I'm building. No spam — just signal.
home.newsletterSuccess: You're in. I'll be in touch.
